mapper.select: SELECT AREA_CODE FROM AREA_TBL ORDER BY AREA_NO
SELECT SIGUNGU_CODE FROM SIGUNGU_TBL WHERE AREA_NO = #{areaNo} ORDER BY SIGUNGU_NO

SELECT ATTRACTION_NO , ATTRACTION_ADDR , ATTRACTION_THUMBNAIL , ATTRACTION_SUMMARY , ATTRACTION_HOLIDAY , ATTRACTION_DESIGNATION , ATTRACTION_FEE , ATTRACTION_RESTROOM , ATTRACTION_ACCESSIBLE , ATTRACTION_PARKING , ATTRACTION_PHONE , ATTRACTION_TITLE FROM TEST_ATTRACTION_TBL JOIN SIGUNGU_TBL USING (SIGUNGU_NO) JOIN AREA_TBL USING (AREA_NO)
AND AREA_CODE = #{areaCode}
AND SIGUNGU_NO IN
#{item}
AND SIGUNGU_NO = 0
AND ATTRACTION_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND ATTRACTION_FEE LIKE '%무료%'
AND ATTRACTION_RESTROOM LIKE '%있음%'
AND ATTRACTION_ACCESSIBLE NOT LIKE '%없음%'
AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE(ATTRACTION_PARKING, '불가|없음')
ORDER BY ATTRACTION_NO OFFSET #{page} * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEST_ATTRACTION_TBL JOIN SIGUNGU_TBL USING (SIGUNGU_NO) JOIN AREA_TBL USING (AREA_NO)
AND AREA_CODE = #{areaCode}
AND SIGUNGU_NO IN
#{item}
AND SIGUNGU_NO = 0
AND ATTRACTION_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND ATTRACTION_FEE LIKE '%무료%'
AND ATTRACTION_RESTROOM LIKE '%있음%'
AND ATTRACTION_ACCESSIBLE NOT LIKE '%없음%'
AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE(ATTRACTION_PARKING, '불가|없음')
AND ATTRACTION_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
SELECT AREA_NO , AREA_CODE , AREA_NAME FROM AREA_TBL
SELECT SIGUNGU_NO , SIGUNGU_CODE , SIGUNGU_NAME , AREA_NO FROM SIGUNGU_TBL JOIN AREA_TBL USING (AREA_NO) WHERE AREA_CODE = #{areaCode} ORDER BY SIGUNGU_NAME

SELECT BOARD_NO , CASE WHEN LENGTH(BOARD_TITLE) > 15 THEN RTRIM(SUBSTR(BOARD_TITLE, 1, 10)) || ' ...' ELSE BOARD_TITLE END AS BOARD_TITLE , BOARD_THUMB , BOARD_WRITER , BOARD_DATE FROM BOARD_TBL B WHERE BOARD_CATEGORY = 1 AND BOARD_STATUS = 1 AND ATTRACTION_NO = #{attractionNo}
ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE_TBL L WHERE L.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO) DESC
ORDER BY BOARD_DATE DESC
ORDER BY BOARD_DATE ASC

SELECT A.ATTRACTION_NO, A.ATTRACTION_ADDR, A.ATTRACTION_THUMBNAIL, A.ATTRACTION_SUMMARY, A.ATTRACTION_HOLIDAY, A.ATTRACTION_DESIGNATION, A.ATTRACTION_FEE, A.ATTRACTION_RESTROOM, A.ATTRACTION_ACCESSIBLE, A.ATTRACTION_PARKING, A.ATTRACTION_PHONE, A.ATTRACTION_TITLE FROM TEST_ATTRACTION_TBL A JOIN TEST_ATTRACTION_WISH_TBL W ON (A.ATTRACTION_NO = W.ATTRACTION_NO) WHERE W.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY W.ATTRACTION_WISH_NO DESC OFFSET (#{page} * #{size}) ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
